name: Tragedy Repeats

granted_abilities.name: Ashen Ovation
granted_abilities.text: For each raise this model's attack actions receive, an enemy model within 3" of this model gains an Entranced token.

granted_actions.name: Painted Fury
granted_actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.

extraction_notes: The limitations line shows a dash (-) indicating no limitations.
The Painted Fury action has a TN of 5, making it a tactical action.
The action icons (double swords) before 'Painted Fury' indicate a general tactical action.
